findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "avizo_my_items" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "avizo_my_items" stacks urgency/override words (never, warning). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
